description: A patient identified as high-risk needs to be enrolled in a care management program.

nodes.task_description: Identify the patient who has been recommended for care management.

expected_outcome.expected: Care manager finds the patient in their work queue.

nodes.task_description: Contact the patient to explain the program and obtain their consent to enroll.

expected_outcome.expected: The patient agrees to participate in the program.

nodes.task_description: Update the patient's status in the system to 'Enrolled in Care Management' and assign them a primary care manager.

expected_outcome.expected: The patient is successfully enrolled, and their care can be actively managed.
